custom_fields.status_row:
[[[ var alarm = states['alarm_control_panel.kuprycz_home']; var chris = states['person.chris']; var claire = states['person.claire']; var alarmState = alarm ? alarm.state : 'unknown'; var alarmColors = {'disarmed': ['#10d090','rgba(16,208,144,0.10)','rgba(16,208,144,0.30)'], 'armed_home': ['#f5a623','rgba(245,166,35,0.10)','rgba(245,166,35,0.30)'], 'armed_away': ['#4d8ef0','rgba(77,142,240,0.10)','rgba(77,142,240,0.30)'], 'triggered': ['#f04060','rgba(240,64,96,0.10)','rgba(240,64,96,0.30)']}; var ac = alarmColors[alarmState] || ['#8a9ab8','rgba(138,154,184,0.10)','rgba(138,154,184,0.20)']; var alarmLabel = alarmState === 'disarmed' ? 'Disarmed' : alarmState === 'armed_home' ? 'Armed Home' : alarmState === 'armed_away' ? 'Armed Away' : alarmState === 'triggered' ? 'TRIGGERED' : alarmState; var chrisHome = chris && chris.state === 'home'; var claireHome = claire && claire.state === 'home'; var chrBg = chrisHome ? 'rgba(16,208,144,0.12)' : 'rgba(74,85,112,0.08)'; var chrBorder = chrisHome ? 'rgba(16,208,144,0.50)' : 'rgba(74,85,112,0.40)'; var chrColor = chrisHome ? '#10d090' : '#4a5570'; var clBg = claireHome ? 'rgba(16,208,144,0.12)' : 'rgba(74,85,112,0.08)'; var clBorder = claireHome ? 'rgba(16,208,144,0.50)' : 'rgba(74,85,112,0.40)'; var clColor = claireHome ? '#10d090' : '#4a5570'; return '
' + alarmLabel + '
C
CL
'; ]]]

card_mod.style:
ha-card { background: rgba(245,166,35,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.3); border-radius: 14px; }
 #icon { background: rgba(245,166,35,0.25); border-radius: 50%; padding: 10px; }

ha-card { background: rgba(157,110,240,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(157,110,240,0.3); border-radius: 14px; }
 #icon { background: rgba(157,110,240,0.25); border-radius: 50%; padding: 10px; }

ha-card { background: rgba(240,64,96,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(240,64,96,0.3); border-radius: 14px; }
 #icon { background: rgba(240,64,96,0.25); border-radius: 50%; padding: 10px; }

ha-card { background: rgba(16,208,144,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(16,208,144,0.3); border-radius: 14px; }
 #icon { background: rgba(16,208,144,0.25); border-radius: 50%; padding: 10px; }

ha-card { background: rgba(77,142,240,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(77,142,240,0.3); border-radius: 14px; }
 #icon { background: rgba(77,142,240,0.25); border-radius: 50%; padding: 10px; }

chips.content: {% set a=is_state('alarm_control_panel.kuprycz_home','disarmed') %}{% set f=is_state('lock.front_door_lock','locked') %}{% set b=is_state('lock.back_door_lock','locked') %}{% set g=is_state('lock.gemelli_door_lock','locked') %}{% set lg=is_state('cover.ratgdov25i_1746c3_door','closed') %}{% set rg=is_state('cover.ratgdov25i_1746b4_door','closed') %}{% if a and f and b and g and lg and rg %}All Secure{% elif not (f and b and g) %}Check Locks{% elif not (lg and rg) %}Garage Open{% else %}Check Alarm{% endif %}
chips.icon: {% set a=is_state('alarm_control_panel.kuprycz_home','disarmed') %}{% set f=is_state('lock.front_door_lock','locked') %}{% set b=is_state('lock.back_door_lock','locked') %}{% set g=is_state('lock.gemelli_door_lock','locked') %}{% set lg=is_state('cover.ratgdov25i_1746c3_door','closed') %}{% set rg=is_state('cover.ratgdov25i_1746b4_door','closed') %}{% if a and f and b and g and lg and rg %}mdi:shield-check{% else %}mdi:shield-alert{% endif %}
chips.icon_color: {% set a=is_state('alarm_control_panel.kuprycz_home','disarmed') %}{% set f=is_state('lock.front_door_lock','locked') %}{% set b=is_state('lock.back_door_lock','locked') %}{% set g=is_state('lock.gemelli_door_lock','locked') %}{% set lg=is_state('cover.ratgdov25i_1746c3_door','closed') %}{% set rg=is_state('cover.ratgdov25i_1746b4_door','closed') %}{% if a and f and b and g and lg and rg %}green{% else %}red{% endif %}

chips.content: {% set on_lights = states.light | selectattr('state','eq','on') | list | count %}{{ on_lights }} Active

{% set temps = [state_attr('climate.daikin','current_temperature'), state_attr('climate.gemelli','current_temperature'), state_attr('climate.master','current_temperature'), state_attr('climate.upstairs','current_temperature')] | select('!=', None) | list %}{% if temps | length > 0 %}{{ ((temps | sum) / (temps | length)) | round(0) | int }}°F Avg{% else %}--°F Avg{% endif %}

card_mod.style: ha-card { height: 11vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
ha-card { min-height: 20vh; background: var(--ha-card-background, var(--card-background-color)); border-radius: 16px; }
